name: Compal Electronics, Inc.
summary: Compal Electronics, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the manufacture and sale of notebook personal computers (PC), monitors, LCD TVs, mobile phones, and various components and peripherals in Taiwan, the United States, China, the Netherlands, the United Kingdom, India, Germany, and internationally. The company operates through Information Technology Product and Strategy Integrated Product Segments. It provides design, development, and manufacturing services for notebooks, ultra slim notebooks, 2 in 1 notebooks, AIO, 5g module and products, tablets, smartphones, wearable and hearable devices, display products, AR/VR devices, home devices, IoT vertical solutions, medical and healthcare products, auto electronics, and servers. The company also engages in the development, manufacture, and sale of information technology and mobile communication products; and research, development, manufacture, and sale of networking products. In addition, it is involved in manufacturing of lighting equipment; international trading; manufacture, wholesale, and retail of medical equipment; rental and leasing; provision of management consulting and biotechnology services; marketing of monitors and notebook PCs; and maintenance and warranty services for notebook PCs and mobile phones; investment; sale of optical disc drives; construction and investment in infrastructure in Ba-Thien industrial district; manufacture and sale of aluminum and magnesium alloy products; provision of training and education, business information consulting, financial and tax consulting, investment consulting, and investment management services; and retail and wholesale of animal medication products. The company was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.
